scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix next-lane-self-drives/backend" "npm run dev --prefix next-lane-self-drives/backend/client" "npm run python"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix next-lane-self-drives/backend && npm install --prefix next-lane-self-drives/backend/client && npm run build --prefix next-lane-self-drives/backend/client
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix next-lane-self-drives/backend && npm install --prefix next-lane-self-drives/backend/client && cd python-api && python -m venv venv && .\venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt
